name: civiclens-india
description: Non-partisan interactive education on the Indian election process, built for PromptWars 2026.

scripts.build:css: npx tailwindcss@3 build -i src/input.css -o public/tailwind.css --minify -c tailwind.config.js
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('Zero-dep lint: use your editor\'s ESLint/Prettier integration.')"
scripts.deploy:function: cd deploy && gcloud functions deploy askGemini --gen2 --runtime=nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region=asia-south1 --entry-point=askGemini

author: CivicLens India Contributors
